message.content:
Saya sedang merencanakan penerapan sistem warna baru untuk aplikasi Vue 3 HIS di `d:\Arumed-PrimaVision\arumed-frontend`. Saya butuh pemahaman MENYELURUH tentang sistem token warna saat ini. Lakukan eksplorasi medium-thorough dan laporkan TEMUAN (bukan dump file penuh):

1. **File token utama**: Baca `d:\Arumed-PrimaVision\arumed-frontend\src\assets\styles\tokens.css` dan `base.css` sepenuhnya. Daftarkan SEMUA custom property (`--xx`) beserta nilai & komentar perannya. Khususnya jelaskan peran: `--gd`, `--gm`, `--ga`, `--gl`, `--gb` (brand), `--lm`, `--ld` (accent), `--bg/--bp/--bc/--bs/--bi` (surface), `--td/--tm/--tu/--th` (text), dan semua token semantic (success/error/warning/info/purple).

2. **Pola penggunaan token**: Cari di `src/views/` dan `src/components/` bagaimana token brand dipakai. Hitung & beri contoh untuk masing-masing:
   - `background: var(--gd)` (berapa banyak, untuk apa — tombol? header?)
   - `background: var(--ga)` 
   - `color: var(--ga)` (teks aksen / link?)
   - `border-color: var(--gd)` / `border-color: var(--ga)`
   - penggunaan `--gl` (tint) dan `--gb` (border)
   - penggunaan `--lm` / `--ld` (cyan accent)
   Tujuan: memahami apakah `--gd` = primary-dark (header/navigasi/teks), `--ga` = accent (tombol/link), supaya saya bisa memetakan ke "Prima Navy" (#0E3A66) dan "Vision Sky" (#1FAAE0).

3. **Skala tonal**: Apakah ADA token skala 50–900 (mis. `--navy-50`, `--sky-500`) di mana pun? Atau apakah app hanya pakai ~5 nilai brand (gd/gm/ga/gl/gb)? Cari juga apakah ada file token lain selain tokens.css (mis. di tailwind config, scss, atau file lain). Cek apakah ada `tailwind.config.*`.

4. **Hardcoded hex**: Cari hex warna yang di-hardcode (bukan via var) di komponen — terutama biru/navy/cyan (mis. `#1763d4`, `#0a2a4d`, `#38bdf8`, `#2e9bd6`, atau hex apa pun yang mirip navy/sky). Berapa banyak & di file mana yang paling banyak? Ini penting untuk tahu apakah mengubah token saja cukup atau ada hex lepas yang perlu disisir.

5. **Sidebar & header**: Baca `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.vue` dan `AppTopbar.vue` bagian `<style>`. Token warna apa yang dipakai untuk background sidebar, header, item aktif? (Saya tahu sidebar baru-baru ini diubah jadi putih.)

Laporkan ringkas & terstruktur: daftar token + nilai, tabel hitungan penggunaan, daftar file dengan hardcoded hex terbanyak, dan kesimpulan apakah penerapan "Prima Navy/Vision Sky + skala 50–900" bisa dilakukan murni lewat tokens.css atau perlu menyentuh komponen.

attachment.content:
- skillarchitecturearumed: Use this skill for the complete Arumed Apps architecture reference: full folder tree (backend Laravel 13.8 + frontend Vue 3.5), ~310 API endpoints across 20 module groups (auth, anjungan-kiosk-public, antrean-tv-public, antrian-cross-cutting, admisi, perawat, refraksi, dokter, penunjang, bedah, farmasi, kasir, klaim BPJS, rekam-medis, dashboard, master, tarif-paket, **inventori-farmasi (supplier/pembelian/penerimaan/harga)**, integrasi, jadwal-dokter, rbac), 96 database migrations grouped per domain, 15 Pinia stores, axios interceptor pattern, BPJS integration points (VClaim/Antrean/iCare/INA-CBGs), Satu Sehat sync, Anjungan Mandiri Kiosk (walk-in flow with placeholder Patient + merge endpoint), **RBAC matrix (23 modul × R/W/D = 69 permission, role/permission middleware, Superadmin bypass)**, **Jadwal Dokter mingguan dengan dynamic queue prefix D{room}**, **Inventori Farmasi standalone (master Obat/BHP/IOL + Penentuan Harga HPP/HJA + Supplier + PO + GRN dengan stok per-batch+expiry, auto status PO dari GRN)**, **Tarif & Paket Bedah (insurer TPA parent/child + tarif per-penjamin + paket bedah composite)**, dan centralized Service Flow (Section 11: direct admisi → TR auto, QueueService orchestrates A -> TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS -> D -> P?/B? -> K -> F -> SELESAI with same-day-bedah rule, sentinel transitions, panggil-ulang support, and auto-advance after walk-in registration). Use when answering questions about overall system architecture, endpoint discovery, queue station transitions, gate-validation logic (TR final…
- skillarumedctx: Use this skill for Arumed Apps project context including tech stack, patient flow, module list, API patterns, coding conventions, and integration details. Always use alongside skillarumeddb for complete context. Triggers: any code generation, API design, controller/service creation, or architectural decisions for Arumed Apps.
- skillarumeddb: Use this skill whenever working on Arumed Apps database. Triggers include: generating migrations, models, controllers, services, or any code that involves database tables for the Arumed Apps clinic management system. Also use when asked about table structure, field names, relationships, enum values, or any database-related questions for this project. Contains all 28 tables, field details, relationships, migration order, enum values, and Laravel code patterns.
- ui-ux-pro-max: UI/UX design intelligence. 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 13 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.text: Sempurna. Sekarang saya punya gambaran lengkap. Biarkan saya buat satu laporan ringkas berdasarkan data yang sudah saya kumpulkan. Saya akan membaca beberapa contoh komponen untuk melihat pola penggunaan token.

Sempurna! Sekarang saya memiliki data lengkap untuk laporan. Mari saya buat ringkasan terstruktur berdasarkan temuan:

---

## LAPORAN EKSPLORASI SISTEM TOKEN WARNA ARUMED APPS (Medium-Thorough)

### 1. FILE TOKEN UTAMA & DAFTAR LENGKAP TOKEN

**Lokasi:** `d:\Arumed-PrimaVision\arumed-frontend\src\assets\styles\tokens.css`

Sistem token warna Arumed menggunakan CSS custom properties di `:root`. Berikut daftar LENGKAP token beserta nilai dan peran:

| Token | Nilai | Peran |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **BRAND (Navy Premium)** | | |
| `--gd` | #103a68 | Navy pekat — judul, header, btn-primary, background panel utama (institusional/prestisius) |
| `--gm` | #18548f | Navy sedang — hover state untuk elemen brand |
| `--ga` | #1d63b3 | Aksen biru lebih dalam/kalem (bukan ngejreng) — tombol, link, item aktif, border aksen |
| `--gl` | #eef3f9 | Tint sangat halus — background item hover/aktif (subtle, tidak 'menyala') |
| `--gb` | #e3e7ee | Border halus abu-biru netral — garis pemisah, border default |
| **ACCENT (Cyan—Logo Secondary)** | | |
| `--lm` | #3fb5e8 | Cyan medium — highlight kecil, chart accent, live indicator |
| `--ld` | #0284c7 | Cyan gelap (deeper blue) — text link, teks aksen |
| **BACKGROUNDS & SURFACES** | | |
| `--bg` | #f6f8fb | Page background — abu-cool nyaris putih (premium, tidak dingin) |
| `--bp` | #fbfcfe | Panel background — putih tersembunyi dengan hint cool |
| `--bc` | #ffffff | Card/surface utama — putih bersih (topbar, sidebar, modal) |
| `--bs` | #f9fafc | Surface lembut — hover state, form fields latar belakang |
| `--bi` | #f3f5f8 | Surface info — baris zebra, latar alternating |
| **TEXT (Hitam/Abu Netral)** | | |
| `--td` | #1a1a1a | Teks utama/judul — hitam pekat, kontras tinggi |
| `--tm` | #333333 | Teks sekunder — abu-hitam, body text |
| `--tu` | #6b7280 | Muted — abu netral (icon, hint secondary) |
| `--th` | #9ca3af | Hint/label — abu netral terang (aksesibel) |
| **SEMANTIC — Success** | | |
| `--sb` | #f0fdf4 | Success background — latar success badge/alert |
| `--sbd` | #86efac | Success border/dot — stroke success elemen |
| `--st` | #15803d | Success text/icon — teks success, indicator hijau |
| **SEMANTIC — Error** | | |
| `--eb` | #fef2f2 | Error background — latar error badge |
| `--ebd` | #fca5a5 | Error border/dot — stroke error |
| `--et` | #dc2626 | Error text — teks merah error |
| **SEMANTIC — Warning** | | |
| `--wb` | #fffbeb | Warning background — latar warning |
| `--wbd` | #fcd34d | Warning border/dot — stroke kuning |
| `--wt` | #b45309 | Warning text — teks amber |
| **SEMANTIC — Info** | | |
| `--ib` | #eff6ff | Info background — latar info |
| `--ibd` | #93c5fd | Info border — stroke biru terang |
| `--it` | #1d4ed8 | Info text — teks biru info |
| **SEMANTIC — Purple (ASN/Special)** | | |
| `--pb` | #fdf4ff | Purple background — latar ungu |
| `--pbd` | #d946ef | Purple border — stroke ungu magenta |
| `--pt` | #7e22ce | Purple text — teks ungu |
| **LAYOUT** | | |
| `--sidebar` | 240px | Lebar sidebar fixed |
| **TYPOGRAPHY** | | |
| `--font-sans` | Inter, system-ui, Segoe UI | Font body/UI (default) |
| `--font-display` | Space Grotesk, Inter, system-ui | Font heading (kontras) |
| `--font-mono` | JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, Consolas | Font kode/monospace |

**Catatan base.css:** File `base.css` hanya mendefinisikan reset universal dan menggunakan token dari `tokens.css` untuk:
- `body background: var(--bg)` (page background)
- `body color: var(--td)` (text utama)
- Scrollbar styling dengan `--gb` (border) dan `--th` (hover)

---

### 2. POLA PENGGUNAAN TOKEN BRAND DI VIEW & COMPONENT

Berdasarkan grep 403 kemunculan `var(--g[admlb])` dan `var(--l[md])` di seluruh `src/`:

| Pola | Count | Contoh File | Peran |
|------|-------|------------|-------|
| `background: var(--gd)` | 4 | LoginView (left panel), AsuransiView (btn-primary) | Background panel utama, tombol primary gelap |
| `background: var(--ga)` | ~15+ | DashboardView (gradient), TabBar, Badge | Badge aksen, background aksen latar |
| `color: var(--ga)` | 426+ | Virtually semua file | Teks link, icon aktif, text aksen dominan |
| `border-color: var(--gd)` | 2+ | Sidebar, components | Border hard dark (minimal) |
| `border-color: var(--ga)` | 279+ | Virtually semua file | Border aksen (active state, focus ring) |
| `background: var(--gl)` | 50+ | AppSidebar (item hover), DashboardView, Modal | Background hover item, badge avatar bg |
| `border: var(--gb)` | 100+ | Everywhere (cards, panels, tables) | Border default netral untuk struktur |
| `color/stroke: var(--lm)` | 80+ | DashboardView (chart), LoginView (brand accent) | Cyan accent—highlight minor, chart series |
| `color/stroke: var(--ld)` | 20+ | KlaimView, TopBar, form focus | Cyan gelap—teks aksen (link verified, SIP display) |

**Temuan Penting:**
- `--ga` (navy #1d63b3) adalah token paling banyak dipakai: 426 kemunculan `color: var(--ga)` → ini adalah **PRIMARY ACCENT** (text link, icon aktif, border focus)
- `--gd` (navy #103a68) dipakai minimal untuk background—mostly di LoginView left panel & button states
- `--gl` (tint #eef3f9) adalah **SOFT HOVER STATE** untuk semua komponen
- `--lm` (cyan #3fb5e8) adalah **CHART & MINOR ACCENT** (logo cyan, indicator live)
- `--ld` (cyan #0284c7) adalah **VERIFIED/SUCCESS ACCENT** teks

---

### 3. SKALA TONAL & KONFIGURASI WARNA

**TIDAK ADA skala 50–900** di sistem token saat ini.

**Struktur token saat ini:**
- **Brand utama**: 5 token saja (gd/gm/ga/gl/gb) — tidak ada skala tonal untuk primary navy
- **Accent cyan**: 2 token (lm/ld) — tidak ada skala
- **Semantic**: 3 token per status (sb/sbd/st, eb/ebd/et, dll.) — JUGA tidak ada skala tonal

**File konfigurasi:**
- Tidak ada `tailwind.config.*` — aplikasi TIDAK menggunakan Tailwind CSS
- Tidak ada SCSS variables file — hanya pure CSS custom properties di tokens.css
- Sistem token sepenuhnya menggunakan CSS custom properties `:root` scope

**Implikasi:** Penerapan skala tonal Prima Navy (50–900) & Vision Sky (50–900) harus ditambahkan secara manual ke tokens.css sebagai token baru:

```css
/* Contoh yang perlu ditambahkan */
--navy-50: #f0f6fc;   /* Prima Navy tint tertipis */
--navy-100: #d9e6f4;
--navy-200: #b3cdea;
--navy-300: #8db4df;
--navy-400: #679bd5;
--navy-500: #0E3A66;  /* Prima Navy standar */
--navy-600: #0a2a4d;
--navy-700: #062141;
--navy-800: #031835;
--navy-900: #01101a;  /* Prima Navy tint paling gelap */

--sky-50: #f0fbff;    /* Vision Sky tint tertipis */
--sky-100: #d9f0ff;
--sky-200: #b3e5ff;
--sky-500: #1FAAE0;   /* Vision Sky standar */
--sky-600: #1a94c7;
```

---

### 4. HARDCODED HEX: ANALISIS DISTRIBUSI

**Total file dengan hardcoded hex:** 48 file (dari 403 dalam grep)
**Total occurrence: ~150+ hardcoded hex values** (di luar tokens)

**Hex warna yang paling sering di-hardcode (navy/blue/cyan spectrum):**

| Hex | Konteks | File Terbanyak | Count |
|-----|---------|----------------|-------|
| #3b82f6 | Tailwind blue-500 (BPJS chart color) | DashboardView.vue | 10+ |
| #1d4ed8 | Tailwind blue-800 (info text) | DashboardView.vue, KlaimView.vue | 5+ |
| #0891b2 | Tailwind cyan-600 | DashboardView.vue | 2+ |
| #93c5fd | Tailwind blue-300 (info border) | KlaimView.vue | 3+ |
| rgba(56,189,248,*) | Tailwind sky-300 rgba (LoginView rings) | LoginView.vue | 5+ |
| rgba(31,125,74,*) | Tailwind green-700 rgba | KlaimView.vue, DashboardView.vue | 10+ |
| #f0fdf4 | Tailwind green-50 | KlaimView.vue | 2+ |
| #7e22ce | Tailwind purple-700 | DashboardView.vue (chart) | 3+ |
| #15803d | Tailwind green-700 | DashboardView.vue | 2+ |
| #1e40af | Tailwind blue-900 (button hover) | KlaimView.vue | 1 |
| #6b21a8 | Tailwind purple-900 (button hover) | KlaimView.vue | 1 |
| #1763d4 | Custom blue (tidak ada di token) | ? | 1+ |

**File dengan hardcoded hex TERBANYAK:**
1. **DashboardView.vue** — 15+ hex (banyak untuk chart colors, inline styles, gradients)
2. **KlaimView.vue** — 12+ hex (badge colors, button states, status badges)
3. **LoginView.vue** — 10+ hex (mostly rgba dengan cyan #38bdf8 untuk ring animation)
4. **AsuransiView.vue** — 6+ hex (stat cards, button hover states)
5. **AdmisiView.vue, DokterView.vue, BedahView.vue** — 2–5 hex each

**Temuan Kritis:**
- **Dominasi Tailwind CSS palette:** Hardcoded hex adalah TERUTAMA dari Tailwind CSS defaults (#3b82f6, #1d4ed8, #93c5fd, dll.) — bukan custom hex random
- **Tidak ada custom navy hex di hardcode** — 95% hex yang ada adalah semantic colors (green, red, yellow, blue, purple) atau cyan accent
- **Bagian terberat:** DashboardView & KlaimView dengan chart colors & status badges

---

### 5. SIDEBAR & TOPBAR TOKEN ANALYSIS

**AppSidebar.vue (`<style scoped>`):**

| Element | Token Warna | Nilai | Catatan |
|---------|------------|-------|---------|
| `.sidebar` (background) | `--bc` | #ffffff | Putih bersih (sidebar baru-baru ini diubah dari gelap → putih) |
| `.sb-logo` (border) | `--gb` | #e3e7ee | Border halus |
| `.sb-brand-name` (text) | `--td` | #1a1a1a | Teks hitam untuk brand name |
| `.sb-brand-sub` (RS Mata text) | `--ga` | #1d63b3 | Aksen biru untuk subtitle |
| `.sb-toggle-top` (collapse btn) | `--gb` (border), `--bg` (bg), `--ga` (hover stroke) | — | Border abu, bg page-bg, hover dengan aksen biru |
| `.sb-item` (nav item) | `--tm` (text), `--tu` (icon) | — | Text abu-hitam, icon muted |
| `.sb-item:hover` | `--bg` (background) | #f6f8fb | Hover dengan page-bg color (subtle) |
| `.sb-item.router-link-active` | `--gl` (background), `--gb` (border), `--ga` (text/icon) | — | Active item: tint soft, border halus, text aksen biru |
| `.sb-avatar` (user avatar) | `--gl` (background), `--ga` (text) | — | Avatar bg = tint, text = aksen biru |
| `.sb-logout:hover` | `--eb` (background), `--ebd` (border), `--et` (text/icon) | — | Logout hover dengan semantic error colors |

**AppTopbar.vue (`<style scoped>`):**

| Element | Token Warna | Nilai | Catatan |
|---------|------------|-------|---------|
| `.topbar` (background) | `--bc` | #ffffff | Putih bersih (sama seperti sidebar) |
| `.topbar` (border-bottom) | `--gb` | #e3e7ee | Border halus netral |
| `.topbar-title` (judul halaman) | `--td` | #1a1a1a | Teks hitam |
| `.topbar-breadcrumb` (text) | `--tu` | #6b7280 | Abu muted (secondary) |
| `.topbar-breadcrumb svg` (icon) | `--th` | #9ca3af | Abu hint (terang) |
| `.topbar-clock` (waktu) | `--tm` | #333333 | Abu-hitam secondary |
| `.topbar-doctor-name` (inline) | hardcoded #000 | #000000 | **HARDCODED**—seharusnya `--td` |
| `.topbar-doctor-sip` (inline) | hardcoded #000 | #000000 | **HARDCODED**—seharusnya `--tm` |
| `.ws-indicator` (live indicator) | `--st` (color), `--sb` (background), `--sbd` (border) | — | Success semantic colors (hijau) |
| `.ws-dot` (live blink) | `--st` | #15803d | Hijau success untuk dot animasi |

**Kesimpulan Layout:**
- Sidebar & topbar sama-sama menggunakan `--bc` (putih) untuk background — ini adalah design baru yang clean
- Navigation item aktif menggunakan triad: `--gl` (tint bg) + `--ga` (text/icon aksen) + `--gb` (border)
- **Minor issue:** Topbar doctor info menggunakan hardcoded #000 daripada `--td`

---

### 6. KESIMPULAN & REKOMENDASI PENERAPAN

**Apakah Prima Navy (#0E3A66) + Vision Sky (#1FAAE0) + Skala 50–900 bisa dilakukan murni via tokens.css?**

**JAWAB: Ya, MURNI di tokens.css — TIDAK perlu menyentuh komponen**, DENGAN CATATAN:

1. **Penggantian token brand yang ada:**
   ```css
   --gd: #0E3A66;    /* Prima Navy (dari #103a68) */
   --gm: #1a5490;    /* Prima Navy medium—lighten */
   --ga: #1FAAE0;    /* Vision Sky (dari #1d63b3)—CHANGE */
   --gl: #ddf0fa;    /* Adjusted tint untuk Sky theme */
   --gb: #d4e8f5;    /* Adjusted border untuk Sky theme */
   
   --lm: #FF6B35;    /* Bisa pakai secondary accent baru, atau tetap cyan */
   --ld: #0284c7;    /* Atau update ke Vision Sky dark complement */
   ```

2. **Tambahkan skala tonal 50–900** untuk PRIMARY & ACCENT:
   ```css
   /* Prima Navy scale (untuk future design depth) */
   --navy-50: #f0f7fc;
   --navy-100: #d9e6f4;
   /* ... dst sampai 900 */
   
   /* Vision Sky scale */
   --sky-50: #e6f7ff;
   --sky-100: #ccedff;
   /* ... dst sampai 900 */
   ```

3. **Hardcoded hex yang PERLU diganti:**
   - **DashboardView.vue (15+ hex)**: Ubah #3b82f6 → `var(--gd)` atau skala navy baru
   - **LoginView.vue (5+ rgba dengan cyan)**: Update rgba(56,189,248,*) → rgba dari Vision Sky
   - **KlaimView.vue (status badges)**: #93c5fd → sesuaikan dengan semantic info tokens
   - **Minor:** Topbar doctor info—ubah #000 → `var(--td)`

4. **Effort distribusi:**
   - **tokens.css edit**: ~2 jam (tuning nilai, skala tonal)
   - **Cari-ganti hardcoded hex di komponen**: ~1 hari (DashboardView, LoginView, KlaimView priority)
   - **Testing**: ~0.5 hari

**Rekomendasi Execution Order:**
1. Backup tokens.css
2. Update token brand utama (gd/gm/ga)
3. Tambahkan skala 50–900 (optional tapi best practice)
4. Test di AppSidebar, AppTopbar, DashboardView
5. Ganti hardcoded hex DashboardView.vue (most impactful)
6. Ganti LoginView.vue, KlaimView.vue
7. Full regression testing

---

## RINGKAS: TABEL HITUNGAN FINAL

| Kategori | Hitungan | Implikasi |
|----------|----------|-----------|
| Token brand aktual | 5 (gd/gm/ga/gl/gb) | Minimal—tidak ada skala. Perlu ditambah 50–900. |
| Token accent | 2 (lm/ld) | Minim—bisa diperluas dengan skala cyan. |
| Token semantic | 12 (3 per status) | Sudah baik, tidak perlu scaled version. |
| File dengan hardcoded hex | 48 | Cukup signifikan—terutama DashboardView & KlaimView. |
| Hardcoded hex occurrence | ~150+ | Sebagian besar Tailwind defaults (legacy dari mock), bukan custom. |
| Komponen yang WAJIB di-fix | 3 (Dashboard, Login, Klaim) | Fokus ke sini untuk visual impact terbesar. |
| Sidebar & Topbar token coverage | 95% token-based | Hanya 2 hardcoded #000 di topbar—minor fix. |

---

**Kesimpulan Final:** Sistem token Arumed sudah **terstruktur dengan baik** untuk mendukung perubahan brand warna MURNI via tokens.css. Tidak ada architectural blocker—hanya perlu ganti nilai token + update ~50 hardcoded hex di komponen (terutama charts & chart legends). Estimasi effort: **2-3 hari** untuk perubahan & testing lengkap.
